hooks.command:
cat <<'CLAUDESQUAD_STARTUP'
[Claude Squad SessionStart — 2026-04-27]
Session activated. If /squad mode, read startup packet from .claude_squad/:
  1. .claude_squad/identity/claude-now.md
  2. .claude_squad/identity/claude-goal-drift.md
  3. .claude_squad/identity/claude-requirement-pool.md
  4. .claude_squad/memory/claude-DECISION_TRAIL.md
  5. .claude_squad/memory/OPEN_THREADS.md
Write domain: .claude_squad/ only. Copilot Squad .squad/ is read-only reference.
HR5: checkpoint UTC format. HR1-HR6 from CLAUDE.md §Long-run hard rules apply.
CLAUDESQUAD_STARTUP
